name: IdsEdwSubIdHistDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH main_select AS (SELECT hist.SUB_SK AS SUB_SK, hist.IDS_RCRD_STRT_DT_SK AS EDW_RCRD_STRT_DT_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK')) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE dbo.trim_default(COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK')) END AS SRC_SYS_CD, hist.SUB_UNIQ_KEY AS SUB_UNIQ_KEY, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, hist.IDS_CUR_RCRD_IN AS EDW_CUR_RCRD_IN, hist.IDS_RCRD_END_DT_SK AS EDW_RCRD_END_DT_SK, hist.GRP_SK AS GRP_SK, hist.GRP_ID AS GRP_ID, hist.SCRD_IN AS SCRD_IN, hist.SUB_INDV_BE_KEY AS SUB_INDV_BE_KEY, hist.SUB_ID AS SUB_ID, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.SUB_ID_HIST hist INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_MBR_DRVR DRVR ON hist.SUB_UNIQ_KEY=DRVR.KEY_VAL_INT LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON hist.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=CD.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE DRVR.SUBJ_NM='SUB_UNIQ_KEY' AND hist.SUB_SK <> 0 AND hist.SUB_SK <> 1), unk_row AS (SELECT 0 AS SUB_SK, '1753-01-01' AS EDW_RCRD_STRT_DT_SK, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 0 AS SUB_UNIQ_KEY, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 'N' AS EDW_CUR_RCRD_IN, '1753-01-01' AS EDW_RCRD_END_DT_SK, 0 AS GRP_SK, 'UNK' AS GRP_ID, 'N' AS SCRD_IN, 0 AS SUB_INDV_BE_KEY, 'UNK' AS SUB_ID, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK), na_row AS (SELECT 1 AS SUB_SK, '1753-01-01' AS EDW_RCRD_STRT_DT_SK, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 0 AS SUB_UNIQ_KEY, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 'N' AS EDW_CUR_RCRD_IN, '1753-01-01' AS EDW_RCRD_END_DT_SK, 1 AS GRP_SK, 'NA' AS GRP_ID, 'N' AS SCRD_IN, 0 AS SUB_INDV_BE_KEY, 'NA' AS SUB_ID, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) SELECT * FROM main_select UNION ALL SELECT * FROM unk_row UNION ALL SELECT * FROM na_row

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2006 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


JOB NAME:     IdsSubIdHistDExtr

DESCRIPTION:  Extracts from IDS SUB_ID_HIST to flatfile SUB_ID_HIST_D.dat.  Only records with the most recent LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK are pulled.
      

INPUTS:
The following IDS table is used:
SUB_ID_HIST
  
HASH FILES:
                hf_cdma

TRANSFORMS:  
                  TRIM all the fields that are extracted or used in lookups
                           
PROCESSING:



OUTPUTS: 
                    Flatfile: SUB_ID_HIST_D.dat

MODIFICATIONS:
              
MODIFICATIONS:
Date                 Developer                Change Description                                                                                                                                                                                                  Cope Reviewer                 Review Date
------------------      ----------------------------     --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------                                                                                                                         -----------------------------------       --------------------
2006-04-03      Suzanne Saylor          Original Programming.
2013-07-22      Pooja Sunkara           Converted job from server to parallel version. Renamed CurrentDate to EDWRunCycleDate and  Renamed job to IdsEdwSubIdHistDExtr          Peter Marshall                     9/9/2013

2013-10-12      Pooja Sunkara           Corrected a hardcoded schema value to use Parameter                                                                                                                                         Jag Yelavarthi                   2013-10-12

Annotations:
Add CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK and LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK
Job name:
IdsEdwSubIdHistDExtr
Subscriber Rate Extract - Pulls from IDS SUB_ID_HIST to load to file SUB_ID_HIST_D.dat
Write SUB_ID_HIST_D Data into a Sequential file for Load Ready Job.
Extract updated SUB_ID_HIST IDS Data
